overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a moonlit forest trail. The character progresses from a dense wooded area with stone walls through rocky terrain toward a distant rural settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with stone boundary wall

events.description: stone wall transitions to wooden fence as the path opens slightly

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: low stone boundary wall running parallel to the path
dense pine and spruce trees lining both sides of the trail
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a stone wall on the left and dense coniferous forest. The moonlit path winds through tall grass and wildflowers as the stone wall gradually transitions to a wooden fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail with wooden fencing

events.description: large rock outcrop emerges on the right side of the path
path curves left around the rock formation

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding trail as it curves around natural rock formations

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence replacing the stone wall
massive gray rock formation jutting into the path

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a rocky hillside section with a wooden fence on the left and imposing rock outcrops on the right. The path winds around the geological formations as the forest density decreases.

events.description: stone wall returns on left and distant village buildings become visible ahead
vegetation becomes sparser entering the settlement approach

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant settlement with visible destination ahead

entered.detail: stone boundary wall returns alongside the path
cluster of buildings with lit windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path widens as stone walls return on the left and a distant settlement comes into view. The terrain opens into a grassy clearing with sparse trees as Geralt approaches the village entrance under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit trail that transforms from a dense coniferous forest into an open, rocky hillside. It begins with Geralt walking a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall and tall wildflowers, where the surrounding woods create a sense of enclosure. As the path winds forward, the stone wall gradually transitions into a wooden fence while the forest density begins to thin. The scene then opens up into a rugged landscape, shifting from soft greenery to imposing rock outcrops that flank the right side of the trail. Finally, the camera follows the character as he navigates around these geological formations, moving further away from the deep woods toward the open hillside.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a narrow forest trail expands into an open rural landscape under a moonlit sky. It begins with the path widening, where stone walls reappear on the left to guide the way. As the camera progresses, the dense woods give way to a grassy clearing with sparse trees, gradually revealing a distant settlement. The scene then opens further as the terrain flattens, finally bringing the entrance of the village into clear view.
